reference: Hi, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. Constant tingling and numbness in the feet are mostly symptoms of nerve root compression due to a back problem, so I suggest doing a Magnetic Resonance Imaging of the lumbosacral spine. I also recommend using a lumbosacral belt.
text: Hi, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. Constant tingling and numbness in the feet are mostly symptoms of nerve root compression due to a back problem, so I suggest doing a magnetic resonance imaging of the lumbosacral spine. I also recommend using a lumbosacral belt.
